provider: The Education University of Hong Kong 2026/27 Undergraduate Programme Course List

supplements.evidenceNote: The official programme-specific PDF identifies Programme A5B106, Year of Entry 2026/27 and publishes 68 unique coded courses across Visual Arts Studies, Creative and Digital Arts Studies and Education Studies. The official programme page separately confirms the 156-cp domain totals, but the PDF does not publish per-course credit points, Year/Semester assignments, a coded Cross-Faculty Core Course, Field Experience, General Education, Language Enhancement or Final Year Project list. The Education Studies table also does not visibly separate its Core, Restricted Elective and Pedagogy subgroups. Repeated codes that the PDF places in both Visual Arts Studies and Creative and Digital Arts groups are stored once with both roles named in the group label. This supplement exposes only the verified published course subset and does not present it as a complete 156-cp graduation structure.
